attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
 A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,A.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
,A.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE 
,A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
,SUM( A.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  )  OVER (  PARTITION BY  A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT , A.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ,  A.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE )  REVENUE_MIX_SCMS_AMT       
,SUM( A.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  )  OVER (  PARTITION BY A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT , L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  )  NET_REV_MIX_L3_AMOUNT 
,CASE WHEN NET_REV_MIX_L3_AMOUNT=0 THEN 0 ELSE  CAST(REVENUE_MIX_SCMS_AMT AS DECIMAL(27,14))/CAST(NET_REV_MIX_L3_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(27,14)) END NET_REV_MIX_RATIO
FROM
(
SELECT
GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
,CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE='SMALL MEDIUM BUSINESS' THEN 'COMMERCIAL' ELSE RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE END SALES_COVERAGE_CODE 
 ,RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
,SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        )  DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_ICPM   GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_SALES_HIER  RSH
ON (GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=RSH.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY)
WHERE 
RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR IN (SELECT TGT_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT  =4)  
			AND SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN  ( SELECT VALID_SALES_COVERAGE_CODE  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL 	WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT =4	)
			AND RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE NOT IN(SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT  =4) 

AND GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0
GROUP BY
 GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
,CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE='SMALL MEDIUM BUSINESS' THEN 'COMMERCIAL' ELSE RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE END
,RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
) A

SELECT 
	A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
	,A.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
	,A.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE 
	,A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY	
	,A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	,A.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
	,SUM(A.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)  OVER (  PARTITION BY   A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,A.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ,A.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE )  REV_AMT_TOTAL
	,CASE WHEN REV_AMT_TOTAL = 0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(A.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT AS DECIMAL(27,14))/CAST(REV_AMT_TOTAL AS DECIMAL(27,14)) END RATIO_BY_SL_KEY
	 FROM 
	(
			SELECT
				GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
				,RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
				,CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE='SMALL MEDIUM BUSINESS' THEN 'COMMERCIAL' ELSE RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE END SALES_COVERAGE_CODE  
				,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
				,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
				,SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
			FROM  
			  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_ICPM GL
			INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_SALES_HIER  RSH
             ON (GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=RSH.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY)
			WHERE 
			RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR IN (SELECT TGT_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT  =4)  
			AND SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN  ( SELECT VALID_SALES_COVERAGE_CODE  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL 	WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT =4	) 
			AND RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE NOT IN(SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT  =4)
			AND GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0
			GROUP BY 
			GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
			,RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
			,CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE='SMALL MEDIUM BUSINESS' THEN 'COMMERCIAL' ELSE RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE END
			,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
			,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	) A

SELECT
  4 TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT 
 ,Q1.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,Q2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,Q2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,Q1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT     DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT   DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT   DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY   DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY   DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_CREDIT_MEMO_AMT    DV_CREDIT_MEMO_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_DEBIT_MEMO_AMT    DV_DEBIT_MEMO_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_INV_REV_BASE_LIST_AMT   DV_INV_REV_BASE_LIST_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_SHIPPED_REV_AMT   DV_SHIPPED_REV_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_NET_ADJ_AMT   DV_NET_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT   DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_DIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT   DV_DIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_DIRECT_COST_ADJ_AMT   DV_DIRECT_COST_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_INDIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT   DV_INDIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_INDIRECT_COGS_ADJ_AMT   DV_INDIRECT_COGS_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_GMB_COGS_ADJ_AMT   DV_GMB_COGS_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_EXCESS_OBSOLETE_ADJ_AMT   DV_EXCESS_OBSOLETE_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_OVERHEAD_ADJ_AMT   DV_OVERHEAD_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_VARIANCE_ADJ_AMT   DV_VARIANCE_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.RATIO_BY_SL_KEY*Q3.NET_REV_MIX_RATIO*Q1.DV_WARRANTY_ADJ_AMT   DV_WARRANTY_ADJ_AMT
FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_SCMS_OTHER Q1
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_SCMS_VLD_CNTY_SL3 Q2
ON(  Q2.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=Q1.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND Q2.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=Q1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
)
INNER JOIN   $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_SCMS_MIX_SL3  Q3
		ON (
				Q2.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE=Q3.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE 
				AND 	Q2.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=Q3.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
				AND Q2.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=Q3.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
				)
WHERE Q1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE<>'UNK'
